name: Gemini 1.0 Nano
tagline: On-device model; first shipped in the Pixel 8 Pro.
metaDescription: Gemini 1.0 Nano (Google), released 2023-12-06 — part of the Gemini Nano line. On-device model; first shipped in the Pixel 8 Pro.
overview: Gemini 1.0 Nano is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Nano line. Released 2023-12-06. On-device Gemini tier designed to run locally on phones and edge hardware.
What's notable in this version: On-device model; first shipped in the Pixel 8 Pro.
